name: express-jetstart CLI
description: A high-performance command-line interface for rapid Express.js project scaffolding with pre-configured architecture.
highlights: Scaffolds production-ready Express.js projects with MVC architecture in seconds via a single CLI command
Interactive prompts (Inquirer.js) let developers configure module system (ESM/CommonJS) and language before generation
Dual-language support: generates fully typed TypeScript or vanilla JavaScript boilerplate from one codebase
Published on npm with 500+ downloads across 4 versioned releases
